name: COGNIZANT TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS CORP
business: Cognizant is a professional services company that helps clients modernize technology, reimagine processes, and transform experiences. It goes to market across four reportable segments: Health Sciences, Financial Services, Products and Resources, and Communications, Media and Technology. Services include consulting, application development, systems integration, quality engineering, AI, cloud, and security.
sellsTo: Healthcare providers and payers, life sciences companies
Banking, capital markets, payments, and insurance companies
Manufacturers, automakers, retailers, consumer goods, aerospace and defense, travel and hospitality, logistics, energy and utility companies
Global communications, media and entertainment, education, publishing, information and professional services, and technology companies

exposures.sentence: Established in 2026, our Security practice helps clients protect their digital environments and maintain regulatory compliance through comprehensive cybersecurity solutions.

Our services include AI and other technology services and solutions, consulting, application development, systems integration, quality engineering and assurance, application maintenance, infrastructure and security as well as business process services and automation.

Central to our strategy to align with our clients need for continuous transformation is our sustained investment in new technologies, including GenAI and agentic systems, cloud, data modernization, automation, digital engineering and IoT.

Central to our strategy to align with our clients need for continuous transformation is our sustained investment in new technologies, including GenAI and agentic systems, cloud, data modernization, automation, digital engineering and IoT.
Our Intuitive Operations and Automation practice helps clients build and run modern operations through two main vehicles: AI-led automation...and business process outsourcing services.
Examples include digital-, cloud- and security-related offerings, AI, augmented reality, automation, blockchain, IoT, quantum and edge computing, among others, which are continually evolving.
